[000:00:00;000]
[000:00:00;000]
[000:00:00;000]          (scream brawing)
[000:00:00;000]                       Stop doing
[000:00:00;000]                  that right now!
[000:00:00;000]         (glass shatters)
[000:00:00;000]
[000:00:00;000]      (Carz scream brawing)
[000:00:00;000]          What?
[000:00:00;000]            (glass shatters)
[000:00:00;000]           Aah!
[000:00:00;000]          (tire screeching)
[000:00:00;000]               (car crashes)
[000:00:00;000]         (wind howling)
[000:00:00;000]
[000:00:00;000]      (Carz scream brawing)
[000:00:00;000]    (eye blinking)
[000:00:00;000]    (scream brawing continues)
